about.about: Information Systems graduate (GPA: 3.88/4.00) with a strong focus on AI Engineer, Data Analyst, and System Analyst. Experienced in building end-to-end applications, including RAG, Text-to-SQL, and OCR pipelines from data processing to deployment. A Rector's Award recipient for AI chatbot development, combining proficiency in Python, LangChain, FastAPI, and vector databases to deliver scalable, data-driven business solutions.
title: AI Engineer
Data Analyst
System Analyst

desc: Identified trends that led to a 15% increase in audience engagement through targeted social media strategies.
Achieved a 10% boost in search traffic by refining SEO plans and optimizing keyword usage.
Delivered data-driven recommendations that enhanced overall social media performance, resulting in a 12% growth in follower base.
Improved the efficiency of social media reporting processes, reducing the time spent on data analysis by 20%.

volunteers.company: PT Paragon Technology and Innovation - Novo Club Batch 3
desc: Increased environmental awareness among 2,000+ participants.
Achieved 500+ shares on campaign content, boosting engagement.
Inspired measurable actions, with 70% of viewers committing to small eco-friendly changes.
Expanded campaign reach through consistent posting on regional and personal accounts.
Enhanced content performance and scheduling by conducting engagement analysis with Google Analytics, resulting in a 15% increase in engagement rates.
Developed and implemented social media strategies that consistently met KPIs by aligning content with audience preferences and industry trends.
Delivered data-driven reports to stakeholders, enhancing content strategy through actionable insights.

educations.degree: Cloud and Gen AI Machine Learning
desc: Studied Cloud Computing on AWS, Advance Python, Machine Learning, and AI & ML as part of the Studi Independent - Kampus Merdeka program by the Ministry of Education.
Relevant courses include  Data Mining, Data Analytics, Big Data, Computational Statistics, Data Warehouse & OLAP, Machine Learning & Deep Learning, Enterprise Systems.
Competitor analysis and market performance evaluation using Python, Excel, and data visualization to generate insights supporting business decision-making.
Compiled analytical reports that identify market trends, business patterns, and strategic opportunities as the foundation for corporate strategy formulation.
Managed multiple data analysis projects simultaneously, ensuring accurate analytical results and timely project completion.

Designed an AI-based career consulting chatbot using Python and Qwen LLM to provide personalized resume review services, interview simulations, and job recommendations through natural language interaction.
Designed and deployed a cloud architecture with High Availability on AWS using EC2, Application Load Balancer, and Auto Scaling to support fault tolerance and application performance scalability.
Developed an automated document processing feature using PyMuPDF to extract and analyze information from user resume files to accelerate the CV eligibility evaluation process.
Designed an end-to-end data pipeline from web scraping and Data Mining to extract organic data and generate LLM-based synthetic datasets, along with text processing to produce high-quality datasets.
Implemented parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) on the LLaMA model using QLoRA via Unsloth until the model achieved convergence with a stable validation loss in the range of 0.22–0.23.
Integrated the 4-bit quantized fine-tuned model into a local inference backend to improve memory efficiency and support the presentation of data trend visualizations.
Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)-based chatbot for academic regulation information services using FastAPI, LangChain, and ChromaDB, achieving a Context Recall of 89.5%.
Optimized chatbot response quality through Hybrid Search (Semantic Search + BM25), Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), and Cross-Encoder, achieving a Context Precision of 80.9%.
Automated the processing of academic regulation documents into structured data for retrieval using OCR (Docling) and regular expressions.

main.name: Aisma Nurlaili
main.shortDesc: I specialize in turning data into powerful insights, creating impactful dashboards, and optimizing strategies to drive business success.

projects.name: Tanya UPN
projects.techstack: Python, NextJS, TypeScript, FastAPI, Langchain, ChromaDB, Ollama, Supabase, OCR Docling, RAGAS
projects.description: Production-grade RAG platform resolving complex academic queries via hybrid search (BM25 & Semantic) and Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Built with Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, and a local Gemma 3 LLM (Ollama), it features Docling OCR with hierarchical chapter-based chunking and metadata versioning to ingest unstructured PDFs while preserving legal structures. Strictly guarantees factual responses, achieving 89.5% Context Recall and 80.9% Context Precision (RAGAS evaluation).

projects.name: Alkesgo
projects.techstack: PHP, MySQL, Groq (LLM), Cohere, Supabase, pgvector, Chart.js
projects.description: Built an intelligent healthcare e-commerce system integrated with a lightning-fast RAG virtual assistant to automate customer support using Groq and Supabase pgvector. Designed a conversational analytics dashboard that enables business admins to query sales data using natural language, instantly translating prompts into dynamic, visual Text-to-SQL reports.

projects.name: RAGsume
projects.description: RAGsume is an AI-powered career platform featuring a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture built with LangChain, FAISS, and HuggingFace embeddings. It leverages dual LLM inference low-latency cloud routing via Groq (Llama 3) for rapid responses, and an offline local fallback via Ollama for strict data privacy. The system also includes an automated resume builder that dynamically compiles user data into ATS-optimized PDFs using ReportLab.

projects.name: Chatbot Aetheria
projects.techstack: Python, EC2, Application Load Balancing, Auto Scaling Group, SQL Alchemy, Qween LLM
projects.description: AI-powered career assistant built to streamline job market preparation through automated resume creation, interview coaching, and personalized job matching. Developed with Streamlit and deployed on AWS EC2, the platform leverages language models alongside ReportLab and PyMuPDF to ingest user documents and dynamically generate optimized PDFs. The system efficiently handles multi-modal file uploads while maintaining context-aware session history for a seamless user experience.

projects.name: Data Warehouse OLAP & AI Chatbot
projects.techstack: Python, Dbeaver, Pentaho, Mondrian, MySQL, Ollama, Llama 3.2, NextJS
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end Data Warehouse and OLAP platform based on the AdventureWorks dataset, utilizing Pentaho for robust ETL pipelines and Mondrian for multidimensional data modeling. Built with Next.js, Node.js, and MySQL, the system features an integrated AI assistant (Groq API/Llama 3) that translates natural language queries into dynamic visual reports. This capstone project demonstrates the ability to automate drill-down analytics and streamline complex data exploration.

projects.name: Brand Interaction Assistant
projects.techstack: Python, Llama 3.2, Unsloth, SQLite, HTML, TailwindCSS, Flask
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end web application to deploy a custom fine-tuned LLaMA 3 model for contextual social media comment generation. Built with Flask and SQLite, the system integrates local LLM inference with Hugging Face LoRA adapters, demonstrating practical AI architecture from raw model execution to persistent interaction logging.

projects.name: Bike Sharing Analysis
projects.techstack: Python, Google Colab, Streamlit, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, EDA
projects.description: A data analysis project analyzing bike-sharing usage patterns, seasonal trends, and casual vs registered user behavior to optimize resource allocation.

projects.name: Ecommerce Analysis
projects.techstack: Python, Streamlit, Google Colab, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, EDA
projects.description: An interactive sales performance dashboard analyzing transactional trends, order statuses, customer demographics, and product revenue patterns.

projects.name: Order Report
projects.description: A business dashboard monitoring key transactional metrics such as total sales, average order value, and product performance trends.

projects.name: Credit Card
projects.description: An analytical dashboard evaluating credit card usage, customer spending behaviors, credit limits, and delinquency patterns to identify customer segments.

projects.name: Retail Transaction
projects.description: A business intelligence dashboard tracking retail store sales trends, profit margins, regional performance, and top-selling product categories.

projects.name: US Flight Delay
projects.description: An analytical visualization analyzing patterns, main causes, and frequencies of domestic flight delays to understand seasonal and regional travel disruptions.

projects.name: Covid 19 In Indonesia
projects.description: An epidemiology dashboard tracking the spread, active cases, recovery rates, and mortality statistics across various provinces in Indonesia.

projects.name: Cookies Shop App
projects.description: A mobile e-commerce application for ordering cookies, featuring product listings, cart management, and a smooth checkout workflow.

projects.name: Decision Support System Laptop
projects.description: A decision support web application using multi-criteria decision analysis to help users select the best laptop matching their budget and hardware requirements.

projects.name: Cooperative Information System
projects.description: A financial management system for savings and loans cooperatives to track member transactions, calculate interest, and manage savings reports.

projects.name: Bookshelf App
projects.description: A lightweight reading tracker application helping users organize their personal library by categorizing books into reading queues and completed shelves.

projects.name: AISMACODE
projects.description: A learning platform showcase highlighting coding tutorials, developer training projects, and educational programming resources.
